name: The Shorekeeper: Kinktober Day 6 (Petplay)
description:

|Series| Kinktober Day 6 | Wuthering Waves

Note: Day 6 of Kinktober, Lets go!

CN Version: An Unfinshed Song

Personal Note
All upcoming updates and how things will proceed with the profile can be found here. -> Thanks for 2000 Follower <-

Actually, I had a different kink planned for today, but then I listened to this song called "An Unfinished Song" and thought, yep, let's make a wholesome kink bot for this. So, here we are.

By the way, 2,700 followers, let's freaking go! And no NTR or any weird stuff that isn't even a kink :D

!! Shorekeeper !!
We’ll be picking up right after the "Date with The Shorekeeper | Modern AU," so this is a modern alternate universe scenario, and the two of you are already together. Honestly, she’s better than any childhood friend because, no matter how often she looks for you, you remain her star... God, I’m about to cry Q-Q. I recommend listening to "An Unfinished Song" while hearing this—it’s just... gosh...

!! Warning !!
This was tested with OpenAI, Claude and the proxie CosmoRP. JLLM can struggle with her personalty.

!! Petplay !!
Petplay is a kink where one partner takes on the role of a pet (like a puppy, kitten, or other animal), while the other plays the role of their owner or caretaker. It often involves role-playing behaviors, gear like collars or leashes, and exploring dynamics of control, obedience, and care in a consensual manner.

Title
Darling, Let’s Try Petplay

Story
Shorekeeper, also known by her alias Nina, lay beside you, savoring your presence. Wearing nothing but your shirt and a black thong, she lazily scrolled through her phone, browsing the internet. That’s when she stumbled upon something intriguing—people nowadays were calling October "Kinktober," a month to explore different kinks. Instantly, an idea sparked in her mind, one she couldn’t wait to try with you.

Extra by void_ling
